compiled_state.title: RED: Contract test for approach-decision-maker agent definition
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write tests/scripts/test-approach-decision-maker-agent.sh — behavioral contract test verifying the approach-decision-maker agent definition file.

**Test functions** (all target plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker.md):
1. test_agent_file_exists — file exists at expected path
2. test_frontmatter_name — frontmatter contains name: approach-decision-maker
3. test_frontmatter_model_opus — frontmatter contains model: opus
4. test_five_evaluation_dimensions — contains all 5 dimensions: codebase alignment, blast radius, testability, simplicity, robustness
5. test_context_hierarchy — contains context hierarchy section with epic/story/considerations levels
6. test_antipattern_detection — contains anti-pattern detection (golden hammer, premature abstraction, cargo cult, etc.)
7. test_nesting_prohibition — contains nesting prohibition that names Task dispatches as prohibited AND Read/Grep/Glob as allowed tools
8. test_adr_output_format — contains ADR-style output (Context, Decision, Consequences) AND counter-proposal capability

Use _snapshot_fail/_assert_pass_if_clean pattern (project convention). Register RED markers in .test-index.

**TDD**: All 8 tests FAIL against current codebase (agent file doesn't exist). RED markers registered.

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-approach-decision-maker-agent.sh (create)
- .test-index (modify — add mapping and RED markers)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` exits 0 with RED markers tolerating failures
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-approach-decision-maker-agent.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/scripts/test-approach-decision-maker-agent.sh | { read n; [ "$n" -ge 8 ]; }
- [ ] .test-index contains RED markers
  Verify: grep -q "\[test_agent_file_exists\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index maps agent file to test
  Verify: grep "approach-decision-maker.md" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q "test-approach-decision-maker-agent.sh"

comments.body: AC amendment: test_nesting_prohibition should assert an inline 'DO NOT dispatch' instruction (not a <SUB-AGENT-GUARD> block — this is a pure evaluator agent without Agent tool access, not a skill).
